comment: Canonical skill-gate manifest. Read skill-gate.md for the schema and authoring guide. Each gate names a skill that must be loaded before the matching prompt/command/MCP action proceeds. The skills referenced here live in this repo's skills/ folder.

gates.remind_message: [skill-gate] About to work on a git commit. Load the `git-commit-practices` skill first — it covers atomic commits, meaningful messages, and what not to commit.
gates.block_message: About to run git commit. Load the git-commit-practices skill via the Skill tool first — it enforces atomic commits and meaningful messages.

gates.remind_message: [skill-gate] Detected a code-review request. Load the `code-review` skill first — it runs a structured, severity-ordered review across security, bugs, edge cases, and quality.

gates.block_message: About to drive the browser with playwright-cli. Load the playwright-cli skill via the Skill tool first — it covers sessions, storage state, and the CLI surface.

gates.remind_message: [skill-gate] Detected a docs/README update request. Load the `update-readme` skill first — it makes targeted correctness fixes without rewriting the author's voice.
[skill-gate] Detected a request to author a CLI skill. Load the `create-cli-skill` skill first — it runs the discover → analyze → generate → verify pipeline.
